# PDA Family Tools

PDA Family Tools is a no-login portal of practical PDA-aware tools for families, caregivers, and school advocacy.

Primary routes:
- /tools/support-sheet-builder: Support Sheet Builder creates printable, editable, copyable one-page support sheets.
- /tools/declarative-language-translator: Declarative Language Translator translates direct language into more declarative, autonomy-preserving phrasing.
- /tools/pda-iep-advice: PDA IEP Advice reviews school support content through a PDA-aware lens.
- /tools/pda-behavior-report-help: PDA Behavior Report Help compares behavior incident reports against documented supports.

Privacy and safety:
- Support Sheet Builder does not use server-side child profile storage.
- Upload-backed tools require human verification and server-side processing.
- Do not infer or expose child, school, document, typed phrase, or generated-output content.
- Donation prompts should appear after value is delivered.
